title: Integrate optimization decisions with value function, malfunction mix, and red flags
description:
## Summary
Integrate workflow decisions with value-function scoring, malfunction analysis, and red-flag heuristics.

## Deliverables
- Define how deterministic metrics, random metrics, malfunction mix, and evaluation-level flags combine into one accept/reject/reroute decision.
- Ensure the workflow can recommend score optimization, SME clarification, upstream remediation, or bug investigation.
- Keep the decision policy auditable and explainable.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Starting next slice after runner completion: integrate workflow decision synthesis with malfunction mix + red flags into final accept/reject/reroute contract, using bundle outputs as canonical inputs.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implemented workflow decision synthesis integration: added shared module synthesize_workflow_decision() to combine policy decisions with malfunction category shares/red flags using deterministic routing precedence (bug_investigation, data_remediation, sme_guideline_clarification, score_configuration_optimization). Integrated into run_candidate_assessment_workflow() output as workflow_decision, alongside policy_decision and bundle artifacts. Added unit coverage for reroute and non-reroute paths. Validation: pytest -q plexus/cli/shared/candidate_assessment_bundle_test.py plexus/cli/shared/candidate_assessment_runner_test.py plexus/cli/shared/workflow_decision_synthesis_test.py plexus/cli/shared/evaluation_value_function_test.py plexus/cli/shared/optimization_acceptance_policy_test.py (19 passed).
